Project Booklet & 8 sculpting Tools: Our air dry modelling clay for kids package includes a project booklet including 50+ step-by-step instructions of different shapes, foods and animals that allow for colour recognition, mixing and matching. 8 modelling essential tools to enhance kids' sculpting experience and bring their ideas to life

Gift of Creativity: Our arts and crafts clay is the perfect gift for kids. It comes in a beautiful box with rich colors, safe materials, tools and a project book. Non Toxic Material: Our air dry clay for children is guaranteed to be non-toxic and completely safe. It has undergone rigorous testing and is EN71 and CE certified. our clay dries naturally within 24 hours, ensuring a smooth and crack-free finish. It is also free from wheat, tree nuts, and peanuts, making it a worry-free choice for children with allergies.
description: Product Description Everything you need Unleash your creativity with our versatile Air Dry Clay! Imagine, Create and Play with ease. Package Includes 26 modeling Clay 26 Colours 8 Tools 26 Sealed Bags to keep used Clay Project Booklet with baby steps Our Air dry clay is designed to be soft, pliable, and easy to manipulate. It offers a smooth texture that makes it effortless to shape, mold, and blend. Enjoy a stress-free crafting experience and let your ideas take shape effortlessly. We prioritise your safety and ensure that our Air Dry Clay is non-toxic and safe for both children and adults. Let your little ones explore their artistic side without worry, as our clay is free from harmful substances. 8 Multiple purpose Tools Equipped with 8 essential tools that will revolutionise your creative process. Effortlessly carve intricate designs, refine textures, and achieve professional-grade results with the perfect tools at your fingertips Quick Drying Clay Experience the convenience of our Quick Drying Clay, designed to drastically reduce drying time. Say goodbye to waiting and hello to efficiency with our Quick Drying Clay. Colour Mixing & Brightness Gradient Our clay is specially formulated to enable seamless colour blending and achieve stunning gradient effects. Explore a world of endless possibilities as you effortlessly blend colours together, creating smooth transitions and captivating visual effects Supper Light Discover the extraordinary benefits of our Super Light clay, a game-changer in the world of sculpting and crafting. With its exceptional lightweight properties, this clay revolutionizes your creative process.
